items.title: The Chicago Sky are open to making changes at the August trade deadline.
items.author: Julia Poe
items.body_excerpt:
The Chicago Sky are open to making changes at the August trade deadline.

But despite recent tension with Skylar Diggins — who sat out again last night — sources say the Sky have no current plans to shop the guard for a trade.

media.title: Chicago Sky are open to changes at August’s trade deadline, but don’t plan to shop Skylar Diggins
media.description: Despite tensions with the veteran guard, sources say the Chicago Sky front office is not currently making an effort to trade Skylar Diggins before the Aug. 2 deadline.
